calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Jul-27-2009 Assigned To Trial Court

SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar Jul-27-2009 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from the Presiding Judge Dept. 206 for Court Trial/Prove-Up Hearing. Comm: William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, Reporter: Lois Jones, CSR #3689.

David M. Balter, Esq. appeared for plaintiffs State Labor Commissioner, et al.
Marga Morales, Deputy Labor Commissioner, was placed under oath and examined.
No appearance by defendant Steven Kraut.
Default was entered against defendant Tracy Chevrolet, Inc., a California corporation, on August 20, 2008.
Dismissal without prejudice as to defendant David Bartel was filed June 16, 2009.
Doe defendants were dismissed today, July 27, 2009.
Notice of Time and Place of Trial was filed on September 8, 2008.

Plaintiff introduced the following exhibit:

Exhibit 1--Tracy Chevrolet, Summary of WARN Act Claims, undated----------------------ID/EVID.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiffs State Labor Commissioner, Division of Legal Statdards Enforcement, Dept. of Indistrial Relations and the State of California, and against defendant Steven Kraut and Tracy Chevrolet, Inc., a California corporation, as follows:

Principal - $185,930.75.
Civil Penalties pursuant to Labor Code Section 1403 - $30,000.00.
Interest - Waived.
Attorney's Fees - TBD Per Submitted Motion.
Costs - TBD Per Memorandum of Costs, for a total judgment in the amount of $215,930.75.

Proposed Judgment shall be submitted to the Court no later than July 30, 2009.
